title: Respiratory Therapist
description:
ICON is a leading contract research organization advancing clinical research for pharmaceuticals and medical devices globally.

We're seeking a Respiratory Therapist to join our Clinical Research team in Cincinnati. This role offers the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to our mission while developing your professional skills in a collaborative environment.
responsibilities: Administer respiratory therapy treatments and manage patient airways
Operate and troubleshoot ventilators and other respiratory support equipment
Monitor patient response to therapy and adjust treatment parameters
Maintain accurate patient treatment records and documentation
Collaborate with clinical team to optimize respiratory care
Ensure compliance with clinical protocols and safety standards

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Respiratory Therapy; Bachelor's preferred
requirements.experience_years: 1-3 years of respiratory therapy in clinical research or hospital setting
